description: Phase WX-K.1 (2026-05-20) — minimal recipe for the `answer` chip per HARNESS_PATHWAY_TAXONOMY.md. Fires for plain Q&A / joke / definition / explainer / chit-chat prompts (mode=answer in the classifier). Target body size <3KB for a 100-byte goal. Two layers only: user-goal + history-recent. Deliberately excludes wisdom-universal, mchatai-fundamentals, web-components, capability packs, and every code-gen layer — the LLM's general knowledge is the deliverable. If a future feedback case justifies adding a layer, add it as a conditional load gated on goal keywords; do NOT make it a default.
